title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The dentist is checking my teeth this afternoon.
‘I'm sorry I'm so late,’ said the driver.
I regret not buying that car when I had the chance.
questions.afterGap: that car when I had the chance.
questions.explanation: Tests 'wish' + past perfect for past regrets.

questions.firstSentence: Perhaps they were delayed by the heavy traffic.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect passive for past possibility.

questions.firstSentence: I had never before seen such a beautiful view.
I find it difficult to get used to the cold weather here.
questions.explanation: Tests the phrase 'be accustomed to' + noun/gerund.
